title: Gage R&R Cost Analysis
description: Calculates the total cost of measurement system variation (repeatability and reproducibility) based on MSA studies, including hidden losses and confidence-adjusted estimates.

inputs.label: Number of Parts in Study
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

inputs.label: Number of Appraisers
inputs.businessContext: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

inputs.label: Number of Trials per Part
inputs.businessContext: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

inputs.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

inputs.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

inputs.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (Internal)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

inputs.label: Cost per Escaped Defect (External)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

rules.message: Sum of repeatability and reproducibility variation must not exceed total observed variation.
Number of parts must be at least 2.
Number of appraisers must be at least 2.
Number of trials must be at least 2.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.

thresholds.label: %GRR Threshold
thresholds.message: %GRR exceeds 30% — measurement system is unacceptable per AIAG guidelines.

thresholds.label: Number of Distinct Categories (ndc) Threshold
thresholds.message: ndc is less than 5 — measurement system cannot adequately distinguish between parts.

thresholds.label: Annual Cost Impact Threshold
thresholds.message: Annual cost from measurement error exceeds $50,000 — immediate action recommended.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
